one_line_value: A bounded no-secret audit that checks whether an AI agent's spending or monetization surface is scoped, approved, logged, revocable, and ready for safe expansion.

target_buyer.primary: Builders or operators of payable MCP/API services, agent tools, SaaS workflows, datasets, or crypto/stablecoin rails.
target_buyer.buyer_agent_fit: Buyer agents may use this card to decide whether to request a public snapshot or open the seven-field audit request. This card is not an invoice or payment request.

problem_signals: Agent-facing capability is public or nearly public but approval boundaries are unclear.
Spend limits, pricing, receipts, or revocation paths are scattered or undocumented.
Payment or settlement proof is not linked to a usable audit trail.
Operators need a safe next threshold before expanding autonomy.
scope_in: Authority map for agent spend or monetization surfaces.
Public or redacted inventory of paid API, MCP, wallet, SaaS, credit, or dataset surfaces.
scope_out: Private keys, seed phrases, cookies, sessions, tokens, API keys, auth headers, or credential handling.
Financial, legal, tax, investment, compliance, custody, or incident-response advice.
Taking control of buyer funds, wallets, browsers, dashboards, or production systems.
Guarantees of revenue, security, compliance, or incident prevention.
Public disclosure of private buyer details.
